comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Scorch (2-knob). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 6-knob desktop-preview manifest. Tone stack + cab are baked (cab as 5 biquads, not the desktop FIR, to stay relocation-free).
gid_comment: 0x01 = Dynamics category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DYN_. All custom effects grouped under Dynamics.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
